steps.t: Tame goats from the herd can be found in the northern High Knolls near the refugees' cave. You should catch some of the frightened goats from the Byre…
The refugees are in the cave on the peak north of Byre Tor in the High Knolls. You should lead the goats you caught to the refugees' cave.
Edhild is in the refugees' cave in the northern High Knolls. You should speak with Edhild.
